programmes.show_name: Help Me Make It Through the Night!
programmes.show_description: Non-stop love songs, back to back all night, from the era of Leo Sayer, Carpenters, The Bee Gees & Minnie Ripperton.
60 laid-back & relaxing songs from the 70s... time to Drift Away with Dobie Gray, Safe Cafe, Ralph McTell, The Eagles & Roberta Flack.

programmes.show_name: I'm Stone In Love With You!
programmes.show_description: Crackling vinyl, shag carpets & lava lamp glows - this is how we loved in the 70s! Oh James...
His national treasure status has grown with time, and every one of these songs is now considered a classic. These are Elton's big hits in order, from 1971's 'Your Song' onwards.
A hell-raising 90 minutes of Glam including some rare gems from Sweet, Slade, T.Rex, David Bowie & Suzi Q. If it's inappropriate - then flaunt it!
From the era of Glam Rock, New Wave & Disco - it's all the party hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?
Bruno Brookes guides you through the stats in disbelief! Three hours of top tunes from superstars like Bowie, Abba, Bob Marley, Queen, The Who and more. But why didn't we buy 'em?!
From the era of Glam Rock, New Wave & Disco - it's all the party hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?
What 70s songs have streamed over a billion times worldwide? There are lots from Rumours & Queen's Greatest, but the songs at 4, 9, 12 & 18 might surprise you!
From the era of Glam Rock, New Wave & Disco - it's all the party hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?
Mark Goodier's seven-hour marathon run-through of some of the biggest number 1 videos of the 1970s. From Edison Lighthouse to Pink Floyd via lots of ABBA and Rod Stewart!
Classic hits from just 1 year - 1978!
1978 was another top year in music, as rock stars sang disco, everyone caught a bit of Saturday Night Fever and "Grease" was the word! Simon Bates has the story - month by month.
Classic hits from just 1 year - 1978!
2 decades of movie moments and classic pop hits from the 70s & 80s. Direct from the red carpet - Limahl is ready for his close-up!
From the era of Glam Rock, New Wave & Disco - it's all the party hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?
They all had 1 massive song, then never skirted the UK Top 20 singles chart again! Here are 70 acts from every year of the 70s, in order, who all achieved their 15 minutes of fame.
Experience the magic of 1977 & dance yourself through a long year of disco, pop, soul, country, rock & punk. With ELO & Abba, Queen & Kenny Rogers!
If you thought 1977 was all about punk - you might want to think again! Simon Bates brings you a Silver Jubilee year full of pop, soul, disco, country, love & a little bit of rock!
Experience the magic of 1977 & dance yourself through a long year of disco, pop, soul, country, rock & punk. With ELO & Abba, Queen & Kenny Rogers!
Sixty minutes of back-to-back number 1s from 1977 - a year when David Soul and disco were kings! With Mr Charts himself - Mark Goodier.
Runners-up from the UK charts in 1977 - those 11 songs that didn't quite make it & got stuck behind long running chart toppers from Abba, Donna Summer, Elvis Presley & Wings.
Experience the magic of 1977 & dance yourself through a long year of disco, pop, soul, country, rock & punk. With ELO & Abba, Queen & Kenny Rogers!
Blimey, what a year! Get ready to turn your telly up loud, with the greatest party anthems from '77 including Showaddywaddy, David Bowie, Boney M and The Sex Pistols.
